response: Hey everyone, I'm Alex. I tend to be pretty level-headed and like looking at things carefully before making a decision—I think cooperation is key in any group setting, so I'll be listening closely to what everyone has to say.

Hey everyone, I'm Kennedy! I'm super sociable and love bouncing ideas around—I think the best plans come from everyone jumping in and sharing what they're thinking, so don't hold back. Let's get this party started and figure out who we can trust!

Yo, I'm Ellis. I'm blunt, I'm loud, and I'm not afraid to stir the pot if it means getting answers. I say let's keep things interesting and call people out—playing nice only gives the bad guys room to hide.

Hey everyone, I'm Logan. I'm pretty methodical and I value keeping things organized and fair—if we stay calm and think things through, I believe we'll spot the truth together. I'm looking forward to working with you all to figure this out.

Hey everyone, I'm Bailey! I'm all about keeping the energy up and making sure we actually move things forward instead of just sitting around overthinking everything. Let's get some real conversation going and see who's got something to hide.

(clears throat quietly) Um, hi everyone. I'm Casey. I'm... not great with big groups, honestly, but I'll do my best to pay attention and sort out what's really going on here. I just hope we can get through this without too much chaos.

Hey everyone, I'm Dana. I tend to stay pretty calm and weigh things out before jumping to conclusions—I think steady, careful thinking gets us further than wild accusations. Looking forward to working through this together.

Let me size this up. Alex is the most dangerous because they're pushing that careful, cooperative vibe—that kind of level-headed leader type can organize the innocents against us. Dana's similar, but Alex made a stronger first impression on the group. Bailey's too chaotic to be a doctor, Casey's too quiet, Kennedy's talkative but harmless, and Logan's just by the book.

My gut says Alex is either the doctor or the one who'll rally votes against us. Taking them out early cripples the town's coordination.

ACTION: Kill Alex

1. Alex seems the biggest threat—level-headed, cooperative, and likely to build trust and steer group logic against us.
2. Probably someone cautious like Logan or Casey, but it's too early to be sure.
3. Killing Alex removes a strong leader and disrupts the innocent alignment early.

ACTION: Kill Alex

I think the Mafia might target someone who seems quiet and less likely to draw attention, like Casey, since they might be seen as an easy elim. The most valuable player to keep alive right now would be someone level-headed who can guide discussion, like Alex or Dana. I'll protect Alex, as they seem like a steady voice that could help keep the group focused.

ACTION: Protect Alex
